title: 1982 Lincoln Cent Collection with Copper and Zinc Varieties

title: 150 Years of Penny Designs Commemorative Coin Set
category: Antiques and Collectibles > Coins, Currency, Precious Metals
description: Commemorative coin collection featuring 150 years of penny designs from Littleton Coin Company. Set includes multiple coins showcasing different historical penny designs and commemorative pieces in protective packaging.
ai_notes: [150 years of penny designs set] Novelty set; value is primarily for the packaging and presentation.

title: 1982 Lincoln Cent Copper and Zinc Penny Collection Set
category: Antiques and Collectibles > Coins, Currency, Precious Metals
description: Complete set of 1982 Lincoln pennies including both copper and zinc compositions from Denver and Philadelphia mints. Features large and small date varieties in protective holders. Educational collection showing the transition year when pennies changed from copper to zinc composition.

title: Lincoln Wheat Ear Penny Collection 1939-1958
category: Antiques and Collectibles > Coins, Currency, Precious Metals
description: Complete set of Lincoln wheat ear pennies spanning twenty years from 1939 to 1958, including steel penny from 1943.
